india_trends.title: Crude oil prices jump 4% on US-Iran peace talks failure; Brent crude near $104 per barrel
india_trends.summary: US-Iran war: Brent crude futures rose $3.18, or 3.14%, to $104.47 a barrel, building on Friday’s 1.23% gain. Here's what's driving the rally in crude oil prices.

india_trends.title: Goldman Says Yuan 20% Undervalued, Boosts Currency Forecasts
india_trends.summary: The Chinese yuan is more than 20% undervalued against the US dollar, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc., which expects the currency to keep strengthening over the coming year.

india_trends.title: Pidilite walks pricing tightrope as raw material costs soar
india_trends.summary: Pidilite has raised prices twice to offset a 40–50% spike in input costs triggered by the West Asia war, but sustaining peak margins amid inflation may prove difficult.

india_trends.title: From Gift Nifty, US-Iran peace talks, oil prices to Kospi: 8 things that changed for Indian stock market over weekend
india_trends.summary: Gift Nifty was trading around 24,092 level, a discount of nearly 142 points from the Nifty futures’ previous close, indicating a negative start for the Indian stock market indices.

india_trends.title: Oil jumps as US and Iran disagree on peace proposal
india_trends.summary: Hopes for an imminent end to the 10-week-old U.S.-Iran conflict that would allow oil transit through the Strait of Hormuz were ​dashed after President Donald Trump on Sunday ⁠dismissed the ‌Iranian response to a U.S. proposal for ​peace talks ​as "unacceptable".

india_trends.title: SBI bets on retail, MSME push to keep NIM above 3%
india_trends.summary: State Bank of India aims to maintain net interest margins above 3% in FY27, driven by easing funding costs from deposit repricing. However, slower CASA deposit growth compared to credit expansion may necessitate reliance on costlier term deposits. The bank plans to boost yields by accelerating growt

india_trends.title: Jio IPO set to be fully fresh funding; no OFS
india_trends.summary: Reliance Industries is shifting Jio Platforms' IPO from an offer for sale to a fresh issue due to investor disagreements on pricing. This move prioritizes protecting retail investors by allowing market determination of post-listing prices, with proceeds directly benefiting the company for debt repay

india_trends.title: Why are midcap stocks gaining momentum ongoing geopolitical tensions? Explained
india_trends.summary: Market outlook now points to sustained MF and retail investor interest into 2026, supported by easing crude oil prices and solid consumer confidence, as evidenced by steady volume demand in Q4FY26 corporate earnings and consistent monthly GST inflows.

india_trends.title: Pimco CIO sees risk of US Fed hiking rates due to Iran war
india_trends.summary: Geopolitical tensions in Iran, potentially disrupting oil supplies and raising energy prices, could prompt the Federal Reserve to delay interest-rate cuts and even consider hikes. india_trends.title: India inflation likely rose to 3.8% in April as food prices hardened: Mint poll
india_trends.summary: Economists expect CPI inflation to move closer to the RBI’s 4% target amid rising edible oil, vegetable and energy costs, though no immediate rate action is seen.

india_trends.title: India's largest container port JNPA engages investment banks for planned IPO
india_trends.summary: The government has engaged state-backed investment banks to explore an IPO of JNPA, the country's largest container port handling 54% of national container traffic, as part of its National Monetization Pipeline.&nbsp;
